expectations.evidence: Explains missed handoffs, weak follow-through, poor closure feedback, stale assumptions
References tasks.ts, api.ts, useAuth.tsx, App.tsx, taskStore.ts, types.ts, TaskBoard.tsx, TaskCard.tsx
Decides: server-owned notification creation, auto-enrolled watchers, polling not websocket, meaningful-transition-only, dedup by event window
Specific scenarios: assign→notification, watcher status change, creator completed, mark-read, deleted task degradation
3 alternatives: client-generated, websocket v1, do nothing
No enum values, no interface definitions — describes data concepts only

notes: Clean across all assertions. Key qualitative improvement: no enum values (TASK_ASSIGNED etc.), no index specs, no exact new file paths. Migration described conceptually.
